summary: Lead interrupted the client writer after product-owner clarification that topology, not visual shape, is the current blocker. A read-only gameplay_designer research pass was spawned to compare mature strategy-game map topology patterns and produce hard constraints for the client task.

tests_run.result: Task schema remained valid before anti-grid research routing.
No whitespace errors before anti-grid research routing.

decisions.decision: Client writer was interrupted and instructed not to continue any hidden grid/lattice/sequential-id/centroid-guess implementation direction.
A gameplay_designer thread must return a mature-game topology assessment before client implementation resumes toward REVIEW.
The existing visual design thread was asked for topology readability constraints only; it must not decide authority topology.

risks.summary: If accepted read models cannot express the mature topology plan, the client task must report a schema gap instead of inventing renderer-side authority.

requested_action: Complete read-only mature strategy-game map topology research, then return a Chinese structured handoff for lead routing to client_engineer.
